description: Nova is the nickname for our area, Northern Virginia. We picked websites relating to clothes, places to go with friends and family as well as sites related to our Cathlic high school, Paul VI. Even though our high school is located in Fairfax City in Fairfax County, some of our students are from different cities in NoVa as well as Maryland, Washington DC and even foreign countries, such as Korea. These sites show what it is like to live in Northern Virginia as teenagers.
title: NOVA Teen Life
